markdown:
I live in London, work at [Ocado Technology](https://www.ocadogroup.com/about-us/ocado-technology), and try to focus on these things:

  (in order of time spent)
- working full time as product manager for [Ocado Technology](https://www.ocadogroup.com/): leading online retail into the future by [building better bots](https://www.ocadogroup.com/media/news/ocado-groups-additive-first-bot)
- still dabbling with lockdown induced vegetable gardening, harvested my second abtch of asparagus spears this year (planted the bed in lockdown, so over four years in the making...)
- working out 3-4 days a week, as many as my joints seem to allow, mainly HIIT
- playing with [Claude Code and Gemini CLI](https://github.com/mannepanne/AssetsUsefulStuff) - mind blown
- reading [good books](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/3011094?order=d&shelf=currently-reading&sort=date_added&visible_control=batchEdit)
- pondering the future

  also see [LinkedIn](https://uk.linkedin.com/in/hultberg)

  (list last updated: June 2025 | credit for the /now idea: [Derek Sivers](https://sivers.org/nowff))
